questions.question: Define the String Abstract Data Type (ADT) and list its operations with examples.
keyPoints: List of operations: StrLen, StrConcat, SubStr, StrCompare, StrInsert, StrDelete, StrIndex

questions.question: Compare and contrast the three major string representations: fixed-length array, variable-length with dynamic allocation, and linked list.
keyPoints: Trade-offs: random access, insertion/deletion, concatenation, space efficiency

questions.question: Explain the naive pattern matching algorithm and its time complexity. Describe how the KMP algorithm improves upon it using a failure function.
keyPoints: Time complexity analysis: O(n * m) worst case
KMP algorithm steps: failure function, shifting pattern

questions.question: Implement the KMP algorithm in C to search for a pattern in a text.
keyPoints: Use of failure function to shift pattern
Handling of edge cases: empty pattern, pattern not found

questions.question: Describe the C string essentials: null-terminated arrays, string declaration, initialization, and common string functions.
keyPoints: Common string functions: strlen, strcpy, strcmp, strcat
